purpose: Record the focused Grapple & Unarmed sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket, including the expanded 2026-07-07 grapple runtime pass.

policy.engineReuse: Use the existing SWSEGrappling, GrappleStateEngine, GrappleLegalityEngine, grapple runtime patches, DamageSystem, ActorEngine, and GrappleFeatActions. Do not create a parallel grapple subsystem.
policy.spatialAutomation: Movement/position outcomes such as Throw placement, Knock Heads setup, and Battering Attack impact positioning remain advisory until a dedicated spatial workflow exists.
policy.invalidEntries: Do not implement Grappling Strike as a feat. It was rejected by the strict Combat validity audit. Existing helper access is hard-blocked as a safe no-op.

implementedEntries.name: Pin
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to UNLOCK_GRAPPLE_MANEUVER pin and delegates to SWSEGrappling.attemptPin.

implementedEntries.name: Trip
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to UNLOCK_GRAPPLE_MANEUVER trip and delegates to the existing advanced grapple Trip path. Trip now records that it clears the grapple after knocking the target Prone.

implementedEntries.name: Throw
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to UNLOCK_GRAPPLE_MANEUVER throw and delegates to the existing advanced grapple Throw path. Final placement remains advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Crush
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to UNLOCK_GRAPPLE_MANEUVER crush and delegates to the existing Crush Pinned Opponent path.

implementedEntries.name: Rancor Crush
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes Crush unlock metadata plus CONDITION_SHIFT_ON_GRAPPLE_MANEUVER for -1 CT step on successful Crush.

implementedEntries.name: Bone Crusher
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to CONDITION_SHIFT_ON_GRAPPLE_DAMAGE. The expanded grapple runtime patch hooks DamageSystem.applyPacketToActor and applies -1 CT through ActorEngine.applyConditionShift when the source damages a grappled or pinned opponent.

implementedEntries.name: Grapple Resistance
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to RESIST_GRAB_AND_GRAPPLE +5. Existing SWSEGrappling and MetaResourceFeatResolver consume it for Reflex Defense against Grab and opposed Grapple resistance. Held/carried object Reflex bonus is recorded as metadata for object-attack workflows.

implementedEntries.name: Multi-Grab
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to MULTI_GRAB and delegates to GrappleFeatActions.multiGrab, which performs canonical grab attempts against up to two selected targets. If two grabs succeed and Knock Heads is available, the helper can invoke Knock Heads when requested.

implementedEntries.name: Knock Heads
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes the Multi-Grab rider and delegates to GrappleFeatActions.knockHeads. The helper rolls 1d6 + Strength modifier bludgeoning damage for each of two targets, applies damage through DamageSystem, and measures threshold as damage +5 to represent the target's Damage Threshold being treated as 5 lower. Target adjacency remains GM/player confirmed.

implementedEntries.name: Pincer
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to PIN_MAINTENANCE_AND_CRUSH. GrappleFeatActions.pincer checks an already Pinned target, uses the canonical Pin path for the Swift Action maintenance check, and delegates Crush to SWSEGrappling.crushPinnedOpponent when the check succeeds. Appendage eligibility remains metadata/workflow-gated.

implementedEntries.name: Slammer
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to SLAMMER_SPECIAL_ATTACK. GrappleFeatActions.slammer builds a virtual unarmed appendage attack, rolls a melee attack, rolls unarmed damage with double Strength modifier, adds one unarmed damage die if the actor has Crush, applies damage through DamageSystem, and marks Persistent Condition through ActorEngine when the damage exceeds the target's Damage Threshold. Droid size/appendage prerequisites remain metadata/workflow-gated.

implementedEntries.name: Grab Back
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to REACTION_GRAB_BACK and delegates to GrappleFeatActions.grabBack. Trigger detection remains reaction-workflow/advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Battering Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores grapple-position impact rider metadata. Exact spatial setup and collateral target handling remain GM/player adjudicated.

deferredEntries.name: Attack Combo (Fire and Strike)
deferredEntries.reason: Confirmed feat, but this is better handled in an attack-combo/ranged-melee combo pass rather than the grapple engine pass.

deferredEntries.name: Attack Combo (Melee)
deferredEntries.reason: Confirmed feat, but this is better handled in an attack-combo/melee combo pass rather than the grapple engine pass.

excludedEntries.name: Grappling Strike
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit. Removed from new normalization and hard-blocked in existing helper access.
